The target is the perimeter of triangle ABC, so at least one or more missing sides must be derived before summing.
No multiple-choice options are provided, which is more consistent with worked geometric reasoning than simple answer selection.
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is present ('78').
The geometry setup names specific quantities and a similarity relation, which makes the solution path rule-checkable.
